records._comment: Auto-populated from the Dexie schema in src/db/db.ts (db.version().stores). 'sources' are the detected table names and 'keyFields' is a heuristic guess (fields named id/email/uuid). The records detector reads JSON/NDJSON FILES, not IndexedDB directly — point 'sources' at your exported backup files (e.g. ['*-backup-*.json']) and VERIFY keyFields before running with --apply.
